name: RestrictedServices
description: Customer's Virgin Media services have been restricted or suspended — typically due to missed payments or outstanding balance. They may want to know why services were restricted, how to get them restored, or when they will be reconnected. This is not a technical fault or outage.

sampleUtterances.utterance: My services have been restricted
Why have my services been restricted?
How do I get my restricted services back on?
I want to {restrictionAction} my services
My account has been suspended — what do I need to do?
My broadband has been cut off
I've paid my bill but my services are still restricted
When will my services be turned back on?
I didn't know I had an outstanding balance and now my services are restricted
Can you {restrictionAction} my account please?
My internet has been suspended and I need it for work
I've just made a payment — how long until my services are restored?
You've restricted my services but I set up a payment plan
My TV and broadband have been cut off — I need them back on
Why was my account suspended without any warning?
I didn't receive any notice before my services were restricted
How much do I need to pay to get my services restored?
Can you tell me what's needed to lift the restriction on my account?
My services were restricted even though I paid on time
I've been restricted — is there anything I can do to get reconnected today?
restricted account
My services have been turned off because of a missed payment
